name: Honolulu Spareribs
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Pork spareribs, cut into 1-rib pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lemon juice and 2 garlic cloves in a 13 x 9-inch microwave-safe baking dish. Add the ribs; toss to coat with the mixture.
2. Arrange the ribs, meaty side up, in the same dish. Cover and microwave on Medium-high (70%) for 10 minutes.
3. Turn the ribs over and baste with pan juices. Cover and microwave for an additional 6 minutes.
4. Place the ribs on a rack in a broiler pan. Combine lite teriyaki sauce, green onions, and remaining garlic. Brush the mixture onto the ribs.
5. Broil 4 to 5 inches from the heat about 6 minutes on each side, or until cooked through, basting frequently with sauce.
- To grill: Remove ribs from microwave; brush thoroughly with the lite teriyaki sauce mixture. Cook on a grill 4 to 5 inches from medium-hot coals for 8 to 10 minutes, or until cooked through; turn and baste occasionally with sauce.
6. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
